info.name: Getting Started w/ Page Builder Templates

item.name: FAILDynamic Array of Products with GraphQL Widget Demo
Update Widget Template - Add improved markup

body.raw:
{ "name": "Variant List", "template": "{{#unless _.data.site.product}}
Select a product in Page Builder to populate this widget
{{else}}
{{_.data.site.product.name}} {{_.data.site.product.plainTextDescription}}
    {{#each _.data.site.product.variants.edges }}
  • {{#if node.defaultImage}} {{/if}}
    {{toFixed node.prices.price.value 2}} {{node.prices.price.currencyCode}}
    {{node.sku}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/unless}}", "create_new_version": true }
